title: 008 PICK&PEN
description:
PICK&PEN, the chicken of Babolna, Hungary
Figurative Drawing for Beginners.
New principles on how to approach "Gegenständlichkeit".
10 000 one day old chicks are probing the motorik of Da Vaz.

Synchronized for 3 monitors.

camera 1: Juri Burak
camera 2: Lászlo Dörflinger
camera 3: Ernö Nagy
coordination: András Péterffy
editing: Sándor Gréczi
directed by Jürg Da Vaz
filmed on site at Babolna, Hungary
a handmade Da Vaz production© 1998
